title: Western Cape police probe death of three men in Delft
description: NATIONAL NEWS - Detectives attached to the...
bodyText:
NATIONAL NEWS - Detectives attached to the Western Cape Provincial Serious and Violent Crimes Unit are probing the circumstances that led to the death of three males aged 27, 30 and 34 and the attempted murder of a 14-year-old male on Sunday at around 17:00 in Seine Street in Delft, Western Cape.


> This is what is believed to be a gang-related incident. Unknown assailants opened fire at the group that was sitting in the yard of a residence and fled the scene empty handed.


Anti-Gang Unit members were deployed in the area to search for the suspects and prevent any further violence that could endanger the lives of the community.

Any person who can shed light on the matter is kindly requested to contact Crime Stop on 08600 10111 or by using the MySAPS mobile application anonymously. – SAnews.gov.za

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
